x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist AI Search requires search sources to be configured and indexed. Without configured search sources, AI Search returns no results regardless of KB content quality or volume.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure Now Assist AI Search sources via sn_aisearch_search_profile_list.do. Add KB, catalog, and record sources relevant to your end-user use cases. Index each source. AI Search is entirely dependent on search source configuration.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851cf4
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist AI Search requires search sources to be configured and indexed. Without configured search sources, AI Search returns no results regardless of KB content quality or volume.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>AI Search Index Configuration</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("ais_search_profile");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "AI Search profile table not found", finding: "AI Search (ais_search_profile) is not installed on this instance. AI Search may not be part of the current entitlement or configuration." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("ais_search_profile");
    ga.addQuery("active", true);
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + " active AI Search profile(s)";
    if (count >= 1) return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " active AI Search profile(s) configured. Now Assist AI Search is set up to return results to end users." };
    return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No active AI Search profiles configured. Now Assist AI Search requires at least one active search profile with indexed sources — without it AI Search returns no results to end users." };
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>PLATFORM</module>
<number>CHK0006124</number>
<order>200</order>
<remediation_guidance>Configure Now Assist AI Search sources via sn_aisearch_search_profile_list.do. Add KB, catalog, and record sources relevant to your end-user use cases. Index each source. AI Search is entirely dependent on search source configuration.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851cf4</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
